name: Cajun Chicken Nuggets
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken breasts into 1-inch pieces.
2. In a large bowl, combine onion soup mix, bread crumbs, chili powder, cumin, thyme, and red pepper.
3. Dip the chicken pieces into the breadcrumb mixture, coating them well.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook the chicken, turning once, until fully cooked.
5. Drain on paper towels and serve warm with assorted mustards.
Microwave Directions:
1. Arrange chicken in a 13 x 9-inch baking dish, drizzling with 2 to 3 tbsp of oil.
2. Heat uncovered at High (Full Power) for 6 minutes or until the chicken is fully cooked, rearranging the chicken once during cooking.
3. Drain on paper towels and serve as directed above. Makes about 5 dozen nuggets.
